fields.label: User
fields.description: User this onboarding configuration belongs to

fields.label: Company Name
fields.description: Name of the company or organization

fields.label: Website URL
fields.description: Company website address

fields.label: Company Size
fields.description: Number of employees in the organization

fields.label: Admin Role
fields.options:
Product Manager
Catalog Manager
E-Commerce Manager
IT Administrator
Marketing Manager
Operations Manager
Business Owner
Other
fields.description: Primary role of the person setting up PIM

fields.label: Current Systems (JSON)
fields.description: JSON array of existing systems (e.g., ERP, spreadsheets, other PIM)

fields.label: Pain Points (JSON)
fields.description: JSON array of pain points the company wants to solve

fields.label: Industry
fields.options:
fashion
industrial
food
electronics
health_beauty
automotive
custom
fields.description: Industry sector selected during onboarding

fields.label: Sub-Vertical
fields.description: More specific industry classification within the sector

fields.label: Template Version
fields.description: Version of the industry template applied to this tenant

fields.label: Custom Industry Name
fields.description: Custom industry name when 'custom' sector is selected

fields.label: SKU Range
fields.description: Estimated number of SKUs to manage

fields.label: Uses Variants
fields.description: Whether products have variants (size, color, etc.)

fields.label: Variant Axes (JSON)
fields.description: JSON array of variant axes (e.g., ['Size', 'Color', 'Material'])

fields.label: Family Count Range
fields.description: Estimated number of product families needed

fields.label: Custom Families (JSON)
fields.description: JSON array of custom product family names defined during onboarding

fields.label: Import Method
fields.description: How existing product data will be imported

fields.label: Active Groups (JSON)
fields.description: JSON array of active attribute groups from template or custom

fields.label: Removed Attrs (JSON)
fields.description: JSON array of template attributes removed by the user

fields.label: Custom Attrs (JSON)
fields.description: JSON array of custom attributes added by the user

fields.label: Total Attribute Count
fields.description: Computed total count of active attributes

fields.label: Category Source
fields.description: Source of product category taxonomy

fields.label: Category Tree (JSON)
fields.description: JSON representation of the category tree structure

fields.label: Brands (JSON)
fields.description: JSON array of brand names managed by this tenant

fields.label: Selected Channels (JSON)
fields.description: JSON array of selected sales channels

fields.label: Primary Channel
fields.description: The primary sales channel identifier

fields.label: Business Model
fields.description: Primary business model for channel strategy

fields.label: Primary Language
fields.description: Primary language code (ISO 639-1)

fields.label: Additional Languages (JSON)
fields.description: JSON array of additional language codes

fields.label: AI Translation
fields.description: Enable AI-powered automatic translation of product content

fields.label: Default Currency
fields.description: Default currency for product pricing

fields.label: Default UOM
fields.description: Default unit of measure for products

fields.label: Workflow Type
fields.description: Complexity level of the product lifecycle workflow

fields.label: Quality Gate
fields.description: Require quality score threshold before publishing

fields.label: Auto Publish
fields.description: Automatically publish products when quality threshold is met

fields.label: Notifications
fields.description: Send notifications when product workflow status changes

fields.label: Min Quality Score
fields.description: Minimum quality score (0-100) required for publication

fields.label: Scoring Weights (JSON)
fields.description: JSON object with scoring dimension weights (attribute, content, media, seo, compliance)

fields.label: ERP Sync
fields.description: Enable synchronization with ERPNext

fields.label: ERP Type
fields.description: Type of ERP system to integrate with

fields.label: Sync Direction
fields.description: Direction of data synchronization with ERP

fields.label: AI Enrichment
fields.description: Enable AI-powered product content enrichment

fields.label: AI Provider
fields.description: AI service provider for content enrichment

fields.label: AI Use Cases (JSON)
fields.description: JSON array of enabled AI use cases (description_generation, seo_optimization, translation, etc.)

fields.label: GS1/GTIN
fields.description: Enable GS1/GTIN barcode management

fields.label: MDM
fields.description: Enable Master Data Management features (golden record, survivorship rules)

fields.label: Standards (JSON)
fields.description: JSON array of applicable compliance standards (e.g., textile_labeling, food_safety, ce_marking)

fields.label: Cert Tracking
fields.description: Enable product certification tracking and expiry management

fields.label: Variants
fields.description: Enable product variant management

fields.label: Quality Scoring
fields.description: Enable data quality scoring for products

fields.label: Channels
fields.description: Enable multi-channel product distribution

fields.label: Workflow
fields.description: Enable product lifecycle workflow management

fields.label: Translations
fields.description: Enable multi-language product content management

fields.label: AI Features
fields.description: Enable AI-powered features (enrichment, translation, SEO)

fields.label: Bundling
fields.description: Enable product bundling and kit management

fields.label: Competitor Tracking
fields.description: Enable competitor product tracking and analysis

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Current onboarding wizard status for this tenant

fields.label: Current Step
fields.description: Current step number (1-12) in the onboarding wizard

fields.label: Started At
fields.description: When the onboarding wizard was first started

fields.label: Completed At
fields.description: When the onboarding wizard was completed

fields.label: Step Data (JSON)
fields.description: JSON object storing per-step completion data and timestamps
